arabic: اسْتَأْجَرْتُ فَلُوكَةً مَعَ صَدِيقِي لِلتَّجْدِيفِ عَلَى نَهْرِ النِّيلِ. صَعِدْنَا إِلَى الْقَارِبِ عِنْدَ الْغُرُوبِ وَأَبْحَرَ بِنَا الرَّيِّسُ بِهُدُوءٍ. الرِّيحُ كَانَتْ خَفِيفَةً وَالنَّهْرُ هَادِئًا. رَأَيْنَا الْمَعَابِدَ وَالنُّصُبَ التَّذْكَارِيَّةَ عَلَى الضَّفَّتَيْنِ. كَانَتِ الرِّحْلَةُ فِي الْفَلُوكَةِ مِنْ أَجْمَلِ تَجَارِبِ رِحْلَتِي.
translation: Iznajmio sam feluku s prijateljem da se vozimo po rijeci Nil. Ukrcali smo se u čamac u zalasku sunca i kapetan nas je mirno odvezao. Vjetar je bio lagan a rijeka mirna. Vidjeli smo hramove i spomenike na obje obale. Vožnja felukom bila je jedno od najljepših iskustava mog putovanja.
translationEn: I hired a felucca with my friend to sail on the River Nile. We boarded the boat at sunset and the captain sailed us gently along. The wind was light and the river was calm. We saw temples and monuments on both banks. The felucca ride was one of the most beautiful experiences of my trip.
